markdown:
# Production Readiness Report: pcb_mount_plate

- Status: candidate_for_pilot_line_review
- Composite score: 78
- Gate decision: candidate_for_pilot_line_review

## Executive Summary

- Overall risk level: medium
- Top issues: Hole diameter drift risk; Probe reach can slow inline verification
- Recommended actions: Prototype poka-yoke nest; Price inline camera option
- Likely bottlenecks: Inspection and pack

## Product Review

- Part type: bracket
- DFM score: 82
- Primary risks: Fastener access at lower flange; Tight connector probe clearance

## Process Planning

- Flow steps: 5
- Automation candidates: none

## Line Layout

- Stations: 2
- Target cycle time: 42 s
- Inline inspection stations: Inspection and pack
- End-of-line inspection stations: Inspection and pack
- Runtime-informed stations above target: Inspection and pack

## Quality / Traceability

- Critical dimensions: 1
- Quality gates: 2

## Cost / Investment

- Unit cost: 8.4
- Total cost: 1260

## Decision Summary

- Go signals: DFM score supports pilot-line planning with standard launch controls.
- Hold points: Runtime-informed review still shows CT instability at one or more launch stations.
- Next actions: Prototype poka-yoke nest; Use this output as an early decision-support artifact, then refine with real line data.
